title: Nothing Happened on Thriller Bark: Turning Point

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #27
dialogue.text: What kind of medical science is that!?

dialogue.speaker: Brook
dialogue.text: Hey, didn't you play the violin?

dialogue.speaker: Brook
dialogue.text: Yohoho! I can play all musical instruments.

dialogue.speaker: Brook
dialogue.text: No... you also had the same resolution.

dialogue.speaker: Brook
dialogue.text: Heh... I can pick anything? Then...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #26
dialogue.text: Shanks and his crew sung it.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: There's... one thing I haven't told you...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: I made... a promise to a "Nakama."

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: I can't stand tall as a man....!!

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: I heard about it from Franky!!

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: And you still remember your promise.

dialogue.speaker: Brook
dialogue.text: Yohoho....!! You surprised me....!! That was sudden.
